gateway_mismatches.detail: User text contains XOR cue, but BPMN has no <choose mode='exclusive'>.
xor_to_seq => missing <choose mode='exclusive'>; treated as sequential (structural fallback)

user_text:
The process begins with the MPON notifying the MPOO about intentions to change equipment. Following this notification, a decision is made. If the MPOO decides to proceed with self-dismounting, they announce this decision to the MPON. Alternatively, if the MPOO decides not to proceed with self-dismounting, they notify the MPON of this decision.

Regardless of the decision made, the process continues with either the MPON or the MPOO performing a final reading of the equipment. After the final reading is completed, the next step involves either the MPON or the MPOO dismounting the old equipment.

Once the old equipment is dismounted, the MPON mounts the new device. After the new device is installed, the MPON reads the meter count from the newly installed meter. The MPON then sends the values from the final reading to the GO.

Following this, the MPON provides the GO with the required data. The process continues with the GO notifying the MSP about the required data. This marks the end of the process.
output_text:
The process begins with the MPON (Meter Point Operator Network) informing the MPOO (Meter Point Operator Organization) about their intentions to change equipment. Following this notification, two actions occur simultaneously. First, the MPOO announces to the MPON that they will dismount the equipment themselves. At the same time, the MPOO also informs the MPON that there will be no self-dismounting by the MPOO.

Once these notifications are complete, the process continues with either the MPON or the MPOO performing a final reading of the equipment. After the final reading is taken, the old equipment is dismounted by either the MPON or the MPOO. Subsequently, the MPON mounts the new device.

After the new device is installed, the MPON reads the meter count from the newly installed meter. The MPON then sends the values obtained from the final reading to the GO (Grid Operator). Following this, the MPON provides the GO with the required data.

Finally, the GO notifies the MSP (Meter Service Provider) about the required data, concluding the process.
